connections.note: Run brain QA before any release
connections.when: release preflight depends on brain QA
connections.yields: brain QA required patterns and guidance

connections.when: release preflight depends on git workflow
connections.yields: git workflow required patterns and guidance

connections.when: Applying release preflight to VS Code extension patterns domain
connections.yields: VS Code extension patterns domain-specific context

connections.when: Applying release preflight to M365 agent debugging domain

connections.note: Preflight validates; release-process publishes. Always use together.
connections.when: Coordinating release preflight with release process

connections.note: Audit before preflight — catches version drift, branding issues (v5.1.0 lesson)
connections.when: release preflight needs architecture audit context

connections.note: quality-gate.cjs automates 5 preflight checks in the build pipeline (v5.9.10 RCA)
connections.when: Packaging, publishing, or running npm run quality-gate
connections.yields: Build fails automatically if invariants violated — no manual discipline needed
